name: Guildheart Hub
identity: Dense industrial-urban nerve center of the Union successor order where contract legitimacy, merchant standing, tariff politics, and freight administration are made visible.
approach: Multi-story counting halls, bonded warehouse blocks, canal-side loading lanes, registry towers, and arbitration pavilions announce that cargo paper, inspection rhythm, and freight infrastructure rule this place.
inside: Clerks, brokers, arbiters, haulers, and guarded petitioners move through dense administrative floors, storage courts, and hearing chambers where guild insignia matters more than noble heraldry.
who_is_out_of_place: romantic loyalists who refuse contract order
faith: Public devotion is present but subordinated to civic contract rhythm.
seasonal_change: Peak caravan seasons thicken hearings, storage disputes, night-loading, and temporary freight overflow into adjacent urban blocks.
law_context: Contract and sanction logic are publicly legible.
Failure to register goods or hearings attracts rapid administrative consequences.

sensory_surface.detail: Multi-story counting halls, bonded warehouse blocks, canal-side loading lanes, registry towers, and arbitration pavilions announce that cargo paper, inspection rhythm, and freight infrastructure rule this place.
Clerks, brokers, arbiters, haulers, and guarded petitioners move through dense administrative floors, storage courts, and hearing chambers where guild insignia matters more than noble heraldry.

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually guild officers, licensed merchants, arbiters, and public conduct is read through expectations such as declare business plainly, observe queue and hearing order.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by The Union, Guild Sanction Board, merchant houses.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as legacy Mal claims, smuggling, Red Hood rumor presence begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Guildheart Hub stands apart because its economy leans on arbitration, tariff mediation; public faith remains visible through Public devotion is present but subordinated to civic contract rhythm.; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble idle aristocrats demanding inherited deference, unregistered traders.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Guildheart Hub begin through settlement rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
